name: Brownie Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sifted flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add sugar and cocoa to the dry ingredients; stir until well mixed.
3. In another bowl, whisk milk and vanilla together.
4. Gradually add the milk mixture to the dry mixture, stirring continuously until smooth.
5. Stir in melted shortening until fully incorporated.
6. Fold in chopped nut meats.
7. Grease an 8-inch square cake pan.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. In a separate bowl, mix brown sugar and cocoa.
10. Sprinkle the brown sugar-cocoa mixture over the batter.
11. Carefully pour hot water over the entire batter.
12. Place the pan in the oven preheated to 350°F (175°C).
13. Bake for 45 minutes.
Recipe from Your Gas Range Cook Book, Fifth Printing, October 1950. Typos by Karen Mintzias.
